notes: Can be used transitively (jemanden umarmen) or reflexively (sich umarmen = to hug each other). The reflexive form is common but the verb does not require 'sich'.

sentences.german: Sie umarmt ihre Mutter zum Abschied.
Er hat seinen alten Freund herzlich umarmt.
sentences.english: He warmly embraced his old friend.

sentences.german: Die beiden Kinder umarmen sich und lachen.
sentences.english: The two children hug each other and laugh.
